problem id: 56672c27
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00001011 -> 10111101
  01101010 -> 01101101
  00101110 -> 01110101
  11111101 -> 00011111
  01000111 -> 10101110
  11010000 -> 11011011
  11011000 -> 11011011
  10111010 -> 01010111

query: 01001010
predicted answer: 01101101
